narration: Two main types of seismic waves exist: P waves and S waves.
visual_description: Context visual: Two main types of seismic waves exist: P waves and S waves.

narration: P waves compress and travel faster. They’re the first to arrive.

narration: S waves shear and arrive later, revealing more about the quake's intensity.

narration: Detecting these waves helps scientists locate quakes and assess damage.
